rulings.Case Title: NGUYET ANH TO VS. CHING WONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Nguyen Luu Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday April 28, 2016, line 3. Defendant Nguyen Luu Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint SUSTAINED with leave to amend for (1) Plaintiff allege and designate specifically which causes of action are brought in her individual capacity and which are alleged on behalf of the decedent; (2) for the causes of action alleged in Plaintiff's individual capacity, for Plaintiff to allege facts giving rise to standing for each claim; and (3) for Plaintiff to allege each element of each cause of action. Additionally, to the extent some of the causes of action are premised on "internal affairs" of the trust, those causes of action shall be brought in the Probate Department; "internal affairs" include (a) determining the validity of the trust provisions and (b) accounting by the trustee. See Probate Code 17200(b)(3). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EAGLE VISTA EQUITIES, LLC VS. MARIO SORTO ET AL (dft 170.6 challenge Judge Robertson III)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday day April 28, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT MARIO SORTO, ADA SORTO DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint is sufficiently alleged. Also, based on the allegations in the complaint, the Notice is not defective. Moving party and its counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. Failure to comply with result in denial of defendant's motions. = (501/REQ)
